audience: Independent businesses and SMEs whose existing website no longer matches their brand, offer, technology or customer needs.
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Een verouderde website zorgvuldig vernieuwen zonder waardevolle content, URL's, functies en opgebouwde SEO-signalen achteloos te verliezen.

searchIntent.question: Who can redesign and migrate our existing website while carefully handling content, URLs, integrations and SEO?
searchIntent.geographicContext: Limburg, Belgium, with service across Flanders, Antwerp and Dutch Limburg.

directAnswer: A controlled website redesign audits the existing site first, retains useful content and functions, maps changed URLs to redirects, rebuilds the user experience and verifies indexability after launch.
title: Website Redesign with SEO Migration | VisualVibe
metaDescription: Redesign your website without discarding valuable content or SEO signals. VisualVibe manages the audit, redesign, migration and technical launch checks.
h1: Redesign your website without blindly starting again
factsToPreserve: Changes to URLs, content and internal links can affect search visibility, and rankings are never guaranteed.
A content and URL inventory plus redirect plan are prepared before migration.
Existing integrations can only be retained when their technology, licences, documentation and support allow it.
The current site usually remains available during development, but any interruption or DNS change depends on the existing infrastructure.
The audit determines what is retained, rewritten or replaced and precedes the specific quotation.
